title: RSW Make Your Own Snowman Christmas Crackers – 6 Pack 12" DIY Festive Crackers with Hats & Mottos – Personalise with Your Own Fillers
features: MAKE YOUR OWN CRACKERS – Personalise each cracker with your own choice of fillers
6-PACK OF 12-INCH CRACKERS – Ideal for family Christmas dinners, parties and school events
CHEERFUL SNOWMAN DESIGN – Features a snowman with scarf and hat on a crisp white background
INCLUDES ESSENTIALS – Each cracker comes with a paper hat and motto – just add your own gifts
FUN FESTIVE ACTIVITY – A creative project for kids and adults to enjoy together before Christmas
description: Bring a frosty, festive feel to your Christmas celebrations with the RSW Make Your Own Snowman Christmas Crackers. This set contains six 12-inch crackers featuring a cheerful snowman design with cosy scarf and hat details, printed on a crisp white background with snowflakes. This DIY cracker kit allows you to personalise each cracker by adding your own small gifts, sweets, or surprises, making them perfect for creating a unique and memorable Christmas dinner. Each cracker is supplied with a paper hat, and festive motto – simply fill them, twist them closed, and place them on the table. Perfect for families, schools, and Christmas parties, these make-your-own crackers offer a fun hands-on activity for kids and adults alike. The larger 12-inch size ensures they stand out as part of your festive table décor and add extra excitement to your celebrations.
